name: Python Formula Editor
description: Advanced Python formula editor powered by Pyodide (WASM). Supports pandas DataFrames from multiple SAC models, SAC variable injection, scoped filtering, compiled-code caching, and writeback to Planning Models.

scriptStorage.description: JSON map of { [functionId]: { script, description, lastModified } }. Persisted in the SAC story property so scripts travel with the story.

activeFunctionId.description: The Function ID currently loaded in the editor.

mode.description: Execution mode. 'debug' → results shown in output panel. 'production' → results written back to SAC Planning Model via setValue().

showToolbar.description: Show or hide the toolbar row.

showOutputPanel.description: Show or hide the output panel.

outputPanelHeight.description: Height of the output panel in pixels.

autoRunOnDataChange.description: Re-execute the active script automatically when a bound data source changes.

pyodideVersion.description: Pyodide version loaded from CDN. Pin to a specific version for reproducibility.

bindingAliases.description: JSON map { [slotName]: pythonVarName } to rename dataBinding1..5 inside Python scripts. E.g. {"dataBinding1":"sales","dataBinding2":"budget"}.

pyodideBaseURL.description: Base URL for Pyodide WASM and packages. Points to your GitHub repository by default.

monacoBaseURL.description: Override URL for Monaco Editor files. Points to your GitHub repository by default.

testMode.description: Enable test mode. The 🧪 Test button runs the script against testFixtures mock data instead of live SAC bindings. Results are never written back to the planning model in test mode.

testFixtures.description: JSON test fixtures used by test mode. Format: { "dataBinding1": [{...rows}], "dataBinding2": [{...rows}], "variables": { "VAR_NAME": "value" } }

getScriptById.description: Returns the stored script string for the given Function ID, or null if not found.

saveScript.description: Persists a script under the given Function ID in scriptStorage. Fires onScriptSaved.

executeScript.description: Executes the script for the given Function ID. Defaults to activeFunctionId if omitted.

getResult.description: Returns the result map from the last execution as a JSON string.

setFilter.description: Applies an SAC-side filter on the named binding slot. members is a comma-separated string of member IDs.

clearResults.description: Clears the output panel content and the internal last-result map.

getVariable.description: Returns the current value of an SAC input variable by name.

setVariable.description: Sets an SAC input variable value and fires onVariableChanged.

getAllFunctionIds.description: Returns a JSON string (array) of all stored Function IDs.

setMode.description: Sets execution mode to 'debug' or 'production' and updates the UI badge.

runTest.description: Runs the script in test mode using testFixtures data. Never writes back to planning model.

getTestFixtures.description: Returns the current testFixtures JSON string.

setTestFixtures.description: Sets the testFixtures property from a JSON string.

onCalculationComplete.description: Fired when a Python script completes successfully. Detail: { functionId, resultCount, durationMs }.

onCalculationError.description: Fired when a Python script throws an exception. Detail: { functionId, error, lineNumber }.

onScriptSaved.description: Fired when saveScript() persists a script. Detail: { functionId }.

onVariableChanged.description: Fired when setVariable() is called. Detail: { name, value }.

onTestComplete.description: Fired when a test-mode execution completes. Detail: { functionId, passed, failCount, resultCount, durationMs }.

onTestError.description: Fired when a test-mode execution throws. Detail: { functionId, error, lineNumber }.
